items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes lets attackers write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, opening the door to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a full-page cache extension for Magento and Adobe Commerce, which can lead to remote code execution via a crafted cookie.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: This Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Adobe Commerce allows a remote attacker to bypass security controls and obtain unauthorized write access to the application without authentication or user interaction.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin addresses multiple security vulnerabilities, including critical, important, and moderate issues, that could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, and service disruption in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image (polyglot) to bypass validation.

items.title: Adobe Commerce SSRF Vulnerability
items.summary: A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) flaw in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source enables high-privileged attackers to manipulate server-side requests, bypass security features, and access unauthorized resources.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.
